EmailTemplate.name: Experience Cloud: Core Connect New Member Welcome Email
EmailTemplate.subject: Please login and complete the recruiting steps to proceed
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Receiving_User.Display_Name__c},
To better understand your experience and background, we ask clinicians to complete a few short tasks in our portal. This only takes a few minutes.
To get started, visit {!Community_Name} and login using your personal email address.
Thank you, {!Organization.Name}
